metadata.description: Checks and balances triggered when gross margin is below industry benchmark
metadata.focus: Recover margin through cost of sales reduction, pricing correction, waste control, and mix optimization

universal_controls.title: cost of sales Variance & Breakdown Audit
universal_controls.description: Split cost of sales into direct materials, direct labor, and general & administrative. Flag any category more than 3% above historical or industry baseline. Investigate supplier price hikes, yield loss, or labor inefficiency.
universal_controls.audit_trail: cost of sales variance report + root-cause investigation log

universal_controls.title: Pricing & Discount Governance
universal_controls.description: Audit all active discounts, promotions, and negotiated rates. Eliminate unprofitable price concessions. Implement minimum margin thresholds for sales approvals.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Discount authorization log + price floor policy

universal_controls.title: Supplier Renegotiation & Sourcing Review
universal_controls.description: Compare top 5 supplier costs against market rates. Request volume discounts, alternative materials, or due date of 60 days terms. Pilot secondary suppliers for critical inputs.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Supplier bid comparison + contract amendment records

universal_controls.title: Product/Service Mix Optimization
universal_controls.description: Rank offerings by how much each product or service is part of total sales. Phase out or repriced low-price items. Shift marketing/sales focus to top 20% high-price products or services.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Margin contribution matrix + product discontinuation log

controls.title: Material Yield & Scrap Tracking
controls.description: Measure input vs. output weight/units daily. Investigate yield drops more than 2%. Implement scrap recovery or vendor return programs.
controls.audit_trail: Yield variance log + scrap recovery receipts

controls.title: Machine Setup & Changeover Reduction
controls.description: Track setup times. Implement SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) principles to reduce non-value labor and material waste during changeovers.
controls.audit_trail: Changeover time tracker + SMED implementation report

controls.title: Shrinkage & Markdown Control
controls.description: Audit inventory shrinkage weekly. Limit manager markdown authority. Track sell-through rates and clear slow movers before reduction of sales.
controls.audit_trail: Shrinkage variance sheet + markdown approval log

controls.title: Vendor Rebate & Allowance Capture
controls.description: Track all vendor promotional allowances, cooperative advertising, and volume rebates. Ensure 100% collection and proper cost of sales offset.
controls.audit_trail: Rebate tracking ledger + vendor correspondence

controls.title: Scope Creep & Change Order Enforcement
controls.description: Require signed change orders for any out-of-scope work. Track unbilled hours vs. project sales. Halt work until additional fees are approved.
controls.audit_trail: Change order repository + unbilled Work-In-Progress (WIP) report

controls.title: Utilization & Delivery Cost Review
controls.description: Compare actual hours spent vs. estimated. Identify low-utilization staff or inefficient processes. Automate or offshore repetitive tasks.
controls.audit_trail: Utilization dashboard + process automation log

controls.title: Portion Control & Recipe Standardization
controls.description: Weigh/key ingredients per dish. Track variance vs. standard recipe. Retrain staff on portioning. Audit waste logs daily.
controls.audit_trail: Recipe standardization sheet + daily waste log

controls.title: Menu Engineering & Price Adjustment
controls.description: Classify menu items by margin & popularity. Increase prices on high-demand/low-price items. Remove or rework consistently unprofitable dishes.
controls.audit_trail: Menu engineering matrix + price change log

controls.title: Job Costing & Variance Analysis
controls.description: Review job costs weekly vs. estimate. Identify overruns in labor or materials immediately. Correct course before project completion.
controls.audit_trail: Job cost report + variance explanation log

controls.title: Subcontractor Bid Review
controls.description: Re-bid open packages if current subcontractors are over budget. Negotiate lump-sum fixes to cap exposure.
controls.audit_trail: Bid comparison sheet + subcontractor negotiation log

controls.title: Flour & Input Cost Hedging
controls.description: Lock in grain/flour prices during low cycles. Track commodity index vs. actual cost of sales weekly.
controls.audit_trail: Commodity hedge log + cost of sales vs index report

controls.title: Waste & Spoilage Reduction
controls.description: Track daily spoilage of perishables. Adjust production schedules to match demand more closely.
controls.audit_trail: Spoilage log + production adjustment sheet

controls.title: Finance & Insurance (F&I) & Aftermarket Margin Tracking
controls.description: Monitor finance, insurance, and service department margins separately. Push the percentage of customers who buy an additional product or service along with a main purchase (attachment rate)s for high-price add-ons.
controls.audit_trail: Finance & Insurance (F&I) penetration report + service department margin sheet

controls.title: Used Car Acquisition Cost Control
controls.description: Tighten appraisal standards for trade-ins. Aveoid overpaying for used products that reduces front-end sales.
controls.audit_trail: Appraisal audit log + acquisition cost report

controls.title: License & Cloud Cost Reallocation
controls.description: Audit software licenses and cloud infrastructure. Eliminate unused seats. Switch to reserved instances or open-source alternatives where viable.
controls.audit_trail: License utilization report + cloud cost optimization log

controls.title: Scope Creep Prevention
controls.description: Enforce strict change order processes. Bill for all out-of-scope requests immediately.
controls.audit_trail: Change order log + unbilled Work-In-Progress (WIP) report

controls.title: Prep Waste & Inventory Par Alignment
controls.description: Track prep-to-waste ratio. Adjust par levels based on daypart demand. Implement First-In-First-Out (FIFO) strictly to know which products you sold and how much those products cost and log spoilage by category.
controls.audit_trail: Prep waste tracker + par level adjustment log

controls.title: Supplier Price Audit
controls.description: Audit weekly invoices against contracted prices. Dispute discrepancies and renegotiate with high-cost vendors.
controls.audit_trail: Invoice audit log + vendor dispute tracker

controls.title: Material Waste & Theft Prevention
controls.description: Secure job sites. Track material deliveries vs. usage. Investigate significant variances.
controls.audit_trail: Material usage log + site security audit

controls.title: Labor Efficiency Review
controls.description: Track crew productivity daily. Replace underperforming subcontractors or crews. Provide targeted training.
controls.audit_trail: Crew productivity report + sub performance review

controls.title: Shrinkage & Expiration Control
controls.description: Audit expired goods weekly. Tighten security on high-theft items. Track shrinkage by category.
controls.audit_trail: Shrinkage report + expiration log

controls.title: Promotion Return on Investment (ROI) Analysis
controls.description: Evaluate effectiveness of discounts. Stop promotions that don't drive incremental volume or sales.
controls.audit_trail: Promotion Return on Investment (ROI) report + discount authorization log

5412.title: Accounting, Tax Preparation, Bookkeeping, and Payroll Services

controls.title: Realization Rate Improvement
controls.description: Track billable vs. collected hours. Write off uncollectible amounts quickly. Improve billing accuracy.
controls.audit_trail: Realization rate report + write-off log

controls.title: Staff Utilization Audit
controls.description: Identify non-billable time leaks. Redirect staff to billable work or automate admin tasks.
controls.audit_trail: Utilization report + automation plan

controls.title: OTA Commission Reduction
controls.description: Shift bookings to direct channels. Offer incentives for direct bookings to save on commissions.
controls.audit_trail: Channel mix report + commission savings log

controls.title: Energy & Utility Cost Control
controls.description: Audit energy usage. Implement smart thermostats and LED lighting. Reduce utility cost of sales.
controls.audit_trail: Utility bill audit + savings tracker
